issue: Rule-assisted dataset generation is mislabeled as human ground truth.

evidence.observation: build_retrieval derives expected and acceptable IDs from title/content keyword and regex rules, then ret_row writes annotation_source=human.
build_no_answer, build_numeric, build_routing, and build_answer_citations also write annotation_source=human without reviewer identities or review timestamps.
Generated facts have empty supporting_block_ids and no supporting_quotes.
